summary: Tested tablet optimizations for NumpadModal and app layout at 1024x768 viewport. All features verified: NumpadModal centered with max-w-xl (576px), 72px button heights, rounded-2xl corners, active:scale-95 press animation. NumericInput shows chevron (>) indicator. ItemCalculator has larger inputs (h-14=56px), larger charge buttons (h-10=42px), larger summary text (20px), taller Save button (56px). RateManagement has larger rate cards with bigger inputs. Global CSS applies min-height 48px to inputs, 42px to buttons. JetBrains Mono font renders correctly on .numpad-digits and .mono classes.

issues: Label font-size is 12px instead of expected 14px on tablet - minor deviation from spec

passed_tests: NumpadModal displays centered with max-width on tablet (576px verified)
Numpad buttons are large (72px height verified)
Numpad buttons have rounded corners (rounded-2xl class verified)
Numpad keys have active:scale-95 press feedback (class verified)
Numpad panel has rounded-t-3xl corners (class verified)
NumericInput shows chevron (>) indicator on right side (6 chevrons found on RateManagement, 2 on ItemCalculator)
ItemCalculator weight inputs are larger (h-14 = 56px verified)
ItemCalculator charge buttons are larger (h-10 = 42px verified)
ItemCalculator summary sidebar has larger text (text-lg = 20px verified)
ItemCalculator Save Item button is taller (h-14 = 56px verified)
RateManagement rate input cards are larger (h-14 = 56px verified)
All NumericInput fields open the numpad on click (verified on both pages)
Numpad Done button works correctly (h-[60px] verified)
Global inputs have min-height 48px on tablet (verified)
Global buttons have min-height 42px on tablet (verified)
NumericInput has tablet-optimized min-height 52px (verified)
NumericInput has tablet-optimized font-size 18px (verified)
JetBrains Mono font renders correctly on .numpad-digits class
JetBrains Mono font renders correctly on .mono class
Numpad value display shows text-4xl with JetBrains Mono font
seed_data_creation: None - used existing bills and rate data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tablet optimizations fully tested at 1024x768 viewport. Key measurements verified: NumpadModal max-width=576px, button height=72px, Done button=60px. ItemCalculator inputs=56px, charge buttons=42px, Save button=56px. Global CSS applies min-height 48px to inputs, 42px to buttons, 52px to NumericInput. JetBrains Mono font confirmed on .numpad-digits and .mono classes. All NumericInput fields show chevron indicator and open numpad on click. Numpad has rounded-2xl buttons with active:scale-95 animation.

mocked_apis.OTP_delivery: OTP codes visible via GET /api/admin/pending-otps instead of actual SMS delivery
